title: listrostachys bidens
intro: Listrostachys bidens, also known as the Bidens Spineflower, is a flowering plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The Bidens Spineflower is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Bidens Spineflower can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
